records.question: What matches played at Wankhede Stadium since 2012 had a win margin of at least 6, with seasons where the man of the series scored at least 315, the purple cap was at least 190, and the orange cap was at least 162?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE season.man_of_the_series >= 315 AND season.purple_cap >= 190 AND season.orange_cap >= 162 AND season.season_year >= 2012 AND match.win_margin >= 6.0 AND venue.venue_name = 'Wankhede Stadium'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.match_id
FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE match.win_margin >= 6.0
  AND season.man_of_the_series >= 315
  AND season.purple_cap >= 190
  AND season.orange_cap >= 162
  AND season.season_year >= 2012
  AND venue.venue_name = 'Wankhede Stadium'

records.question: Which matches played at Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium in Hyderabad since 2012-05-18 had a win margin of at most 5.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
JOIN city ON venue.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE match.win_margin <= 5.0 AND venue.venue_name = 'Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium' AND city.city_name = 'Hyderabad' AND match.match_date >= '2012-05-18'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.match_id
FROM match
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
JOIN city ON venue.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE match.win_margin <= 5.0
  AND match.match_date >= '2012-05-18'
  AND venue.venue_name = 'Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium'
  AND city.city_name = 'Hyderabad'

records.question: Which matches since 2012-04-29 had a win margin of exactly 1.0 where the toss decision was to bat?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN toss_decision ON match.toss_decide = toss_decision.toss_id
WHERE match.win_margin = 1.0 AND toss_decision.toss_name = 'bat' AND match.match_date >= '2012-04-29'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.match_id
FROM match
JOIN toss_decision ON match.toss_decide = toss_decision.toss_id
WHERE match.win_margin = 1.0
  AND match.match_date >= '2012-04-29'
  AND toss_decision.toss_name = 'bat'

records.question: Which matches on May 12, 2015 had a win margin of at least 6, during the 2015 season where the purple cap was exactly 71, the man of the series had at least 334, and the orange cap had at least 187?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
WHERE season.purple_cap = 71 AND season.man_of_the_series >= 334 AND season.orange_cap >= 187 AND season.season_year = 2015 AND match.win_margin >= 6.0 AND match.match_date = '2015-05-12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.match_id
FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
WHERE match.win_margin >= 6.0
  AND match.match_date = '2015-05-12'
  AND season.purple_cap = 71
  AND season.man_of_the_series >= 334
  AND season.orange_cap >= 187
  AND season.season_year = 2015

records.question: Which matches had the man of the match born on 1983-07-09 representing Australia?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN player ON match.man_of_the_match = player.player_id
JOIN country ON player.country_name = country.country_id
JOIN country AS country__1 ON country.country_id = country__1.country_id
WHERE country.country_name = 'Australia' AND player.dob = '1983-07-09'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.match_id
FROM match
JOIN player ON match.man_of_the_match = player.player_id
JOIN country ON player.country_name = country.country_id
WHERE player.dob = '1983-07-09'
  AND country.country_name = 'Australia'

records.question: Which matches had a win margin of exactly 8.0 in seasons where the man of the series is 334?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN out_type ON match.outcome_type = out_type.out_id
WHERE season.man_of_the_series = 334 AND match.win_margin = 8.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.match_id
FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN out_type ON match.outcome_type = out_type.out_id
WHERE match.win_margin = 8.0
  AND season.man_of_the_series = 334

records.question: Which matches played on 2010-03-26 had a win margin of at least 8.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE match.win_margin >= 8.0 AND match.match_date = '2010-03-26'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Match.Match_Id
FROM Match
JOIN Venue ON Match.Venue_Id = Venue.Venue_Id
WHERE Match.Win_Margin >= 8.0
  AND Match.Match_Date = '2010-03-26'

records.question: Which matches played on or before 2011-05-16 at Dr DY Patil Sports Academy belong to the 2011 season where the orange cap was at least 162?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE match.match_date <= '2011-05-16' AND season.orange_cap >= 162 AND season.season_year = 2011 AND venue.venue_name = 'Dr DY Patil Sports Academy'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.match_id
FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE match.match_date <= '2011-05-16'
  AND season.orange_cap >= 162
  AND season.season_year = 2011
  AND venue.venue_name = 'Dr DY Patil Sports Academy'

records.question: Which matches had a win margin exactly 34.0 on or before 2014-05-02?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
WHERE match.match_date <= '2014-05-02' AND match.win_margin = 34.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Match.Match_Id
FROM Match
WHERE Match.Match_Date <= '2014-05-02' AND Match.Win_Margin = 34.0

records.question: Which matches have been played at Eden Gardens on or after 2015-05-04?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
JOIN city ON venue.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE venue.venue_name = 'Eden Gardens' AND match.match_date >= '2015-05-04'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT match.match_id
FROM match
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
JOIN city ON venue.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE match.match_date >= '2015-05-04'
  AND venue.venue_name = 'Eden Gardens'
